Statement on U.S. - North Korea bilateral discussions:  http://t.co/tsJLfOER #DPRK
#SecClinton: Our hope is that the new North Korean leadership will choose to guide their nation onto the path of peace. http://t.co/bzw6rmwQ
#SecClinton: We have completed a third exploratory round of U.S. - North Korea bilateral talks. http://t.co/bzw6rmwQ

#SecClinton: @StateDept and @USAID budget is a down payment on American leadership. http://t.co/bzw6rmwQ
#SecClinton: @StateDept and @USAID budget is a proven investment in our national and economic security. http://t.co/bzw6rmwQ

U/S Sherman: A stronger Pacific focus brings renewed urgency to the quality of our ties to the nations of the Americas. http://t.co/8JT7f9Bl
Under Secretary Sherman: We consider the Americas to be part of the greater Pacific community. http://t.co/8JT7f9Bl
